description: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor Limited designs, develops, and supplies power semiconductor products for computing, consumer electronics, communication, and industrial applications in Hong Kong, China, South Korea, the United States, and internationally. The company offers power discrete products, including metal-oxide-semiconductor field-effect transistors (MOSFET), Shielded-Gate low voltage and mid-voltage MOSFETs, SuperJunction high voltage MOSFETs, and trench-stop insulated gate bipolar transistors (IGBTs), as well as application specific MOSFETs for use in smartphone chargers, battery packs
